reason: prod/platform/platform-core was missing SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET — confirmed via key-listing before write. Copied staging's value verbatim into prod so Slack-connect flows work end-to-end after the prod promote.
incident_note: This is the exact secret involved in the 2026-07-13 incident (generated + set without named confirmation off an ambiguous 'fix that' reply — see ~/.claude/projects/-Users-bado-iccha-brighthive/memory/feedback_never_modify_env_vars.md). This time: explicit per-secret named confirmation was obtained before any read/write (user confirmed 'Yes, copy from staging' for this specific secret + these specific targets), value was copied verbatim from staging rather than freshly generated (no new credential minted), and verified via sha256 prefix match before and after write.
change_kind: aws-secrets-manager put-secret-value (read-modify-write, added missing key, all 26 existing keys preserved) + github-actions-secret-add

source_of_truth.note: Value NOT captured in this file — write-only discipline. The sha256 prefix lets a future audit confirm prod + GitHub secret still match this source without exposing either value.

targets_written.note: Read-modify-write: fetched prod's current 26-key payload (post NOTIFICATIONS_API_KEY addition), added SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET via jq merge, wrote back. All 26 pre-existing keys unchanged.

targets_written.name: SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET
targets_written.consumed_by: platform-core src/common/env-vars.ts zod schema (declared) + brightbot-slack-server Slack-connect flow
targets_written.must_match: prod/platform/platform-core SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET — mismatch = Slack-connect auth failures in prod

rollback: AWS: aws secretsmanager put-secret-value --secret-id prod/platform/platform-core --region us-east-1 --profile brighthive-production --secret-string <full-27-key-payload-without-SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET>. GitHub: gh secret delete SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET --repo brighthive/brightbot-slack-server
approved_by: explicit per-secret named confirmation 2026-07-21 — user confirmed 'Yes, copy from staging' for SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET specifically, targets: prod/platform/platform-core + brightbot-slack-server GitHub secret
